content: agent1: working on 'Support tuple format for XMP in exif_transpose' — modifying src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function, the XMP re.sub block around line 725) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will keep changes minimal/localized to that block.

agent1: yes, overlap confirmed - we're both touching exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py. My fix is narrow: in the XMP re.sub block (~line 725-736), add a branch to handle 'value' being a tuple (apply re.sub to each element). I'll only touch those ~10 lines inside the 'for key in ("XML:com.adobe.xmp", "xmp"):' loop. Also adding one test function test_exif_transpose_with_xmp_tuple to Tests/test_imageops.py (appended after existing test_exif_transpose, before test_exif_transpose_xml_without_xmp). Please keep your logging changes outside that specific block/avoid restructuring it, or let's sync order of edits so we don't clobber each other. I'll apply my edit now.

agent1: done with my change - only modified the XMP re.sub block (added tuple handling) and added test_exif_transpose_with_xmp_tuple. Nothing else touched in ImageOps.py/test_imageops.py, so should be safe to merge with your logging changes.
